channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwe Accelerates Heritage Tourism Boom as Budula Festival Showcases Shangani Culture, Sparks Rural Growth and Draws Global Spotlight on Community-Led Travel Revival

item.title: South Africa tightens security, urges calm as June 30 anti-immigration protests approach
item.description: By Xinhua SOUTH African authorities have tightened security measures and intensified public warnings ahead of planned anti-immigration demonstrations scheduled for June 30, amid growing tensions over undocumented migration and concerns about potential unrest. The March and March movement and several anti-immigration groups on Wednesday reiterated their demand that undocumented foreign nationals leave South Africa by [...] The post South Africa tightens security, urges calm as June 30 anti-immigration protests approach appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Scottland FC eyeing Mamelodi Sundowns’ Shalulile in blockbuster transfer bid
item.description: ZIMBABWE Premier Soccer League title holders Scottland FC are said to be chasing Mamelodi Sundowns marksman Peter Shalulile as they bolster their ranks for next season’s Confederation of African Football (CAF) campaign. According to popular publication FarPost, the ambitious Harare outfit has earmarked the Namibian forward as a priority signing and has already tabled a [...] The post Scottland FC eyeing Mamelodi Sundowns’ Shalulile in blockbuster transfer bid appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Police hunt suspect after Beitbridge murder near night club @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: THE Zimbabwe Republic Police is appealing to the public for information after a 26-year-old man was killed at Limpopo Business Centre in Beitbridge in the early hours of last Thursday. ZRP national spokesperson Commissioner Paul Nyathi confirmed the case in a statement. “The ZRP is appealing for information which may lead to the identification and [...] The post Police hunt suspect after Beitbridge murder near night club appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bolt Cutter bus crew faces probe after viral video of Musami Cross assault @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: THE Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) has launched investigations into a viral video showing members of the Bolt Cutter Bus Crew violently assaulting a passenger at Musami Cross, Domborembudzi, Mashonaland East Province. ZRP national spokesperson Commissioner Paul Nyathi issued a statement on the incident. “Reference is made to the video circulating on social media in which [...] The post Bolt Cutter bus crew faces probe after viral video of Musami Cross assault appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe go ruthless against Bangladesh @3menonaboat
item.description:
On his first day as Zimbabwe’s Test captain, Richard Ngarava made all the right calls.

The post Zimbabwe go ruthless against Bangladesh first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: US$400m Kariba solar deal plans advanced
item.description: Oliver Kazunga Senior Reporter ZIMBABWE is edging closer to securing a landmark US$400 million investment for a 500MW floating solar power project on Lake Kariba, a development expected to boost... (via Ebusiness Weekly) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: The Mysterious Rolls-Royce Accident: Collins Mnangagwa involved in “Ginimbi-style” Rolls-Royce crash soon after his Belarus trip
item.description: Harare – The streets of Harare are rife with speculation and unanswered questions following a horrific car crash involving Collins Mnangagwa, son of President Emmerson Mnangagwa. The incident, which occurred on 27 June 2026, left a luxury Rolls-Royce in a mangled wreck, its wheel eerily “plucked off” in a manner strikingly similar to the fatal [...] The post The Mysterious Rolls-Royce Accident: Collins Mnangagwa involved in “Ginimbi-style” Rolls-Royce crash soon after his Belarus trip first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: 4-wicket Nyamhuri puts Zimbabwe in charge of Bangladesh Test

item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Mbinga: Sir Wicknell Chivayo’s Controversial Empire Expands Globally... From Harare to Cape Town, Eswatini & Nairobi @wicknellchivayo
item.description: CAPE TOWN – The man who has become a symbol of ostentatious wealth in Southern Africa has done it again. Wicknell Chivayo, the flamboyant businessman known to his followers as “Sir Wicknell”, has recently taken to social media to flaunt his latest acquisition: a R160 million (approximately US$8.8 million) mansion nestled in the exclusive Atlantic [...] The post Zimbabwe’s Mbinga: Sir Wicknell Chivayo’s Controversial Empire Expands Globally... From Harare to Cape Town, Eswatini & Nairobi first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
